title: 青葉賞の後に・過ぎる影は

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...I gave the race everything I presently have,
and the results will be a nice launching point for
the Japanese Derby. And yet...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(This indescribable haze deep down inside...
Whatever could it be?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Just what is going on with me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The Japanese Derby is right around the corner...
and yet!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan performed brilliantly at
the Aoba Sho, she doesn't seem as elated as I
would've expected.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, Trainer... At long last, the
Japanese Derby is almost upon us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall learn from this experience and expend
even more effort in the little time we have left. As
such, I humbly request your continued assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first glance, Mejiro Ardan looks the same as
always—just fine. But... something about her
seems off.
choice_data_list: (I might need to tread carefully here...)
(I might need to tread carefully here...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day after the Aoba Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(So many racers are going to be participating in
the Japanese Derby, but my thoughts keep
gravitating towards Yaeno and Chiyono O in
particular...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Their recent races have shown that they've
improved far more than I believed possible.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(And I expect their performances at the Derby
will be just as awe-inspiring.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I know them both so well... That's how I know
they'll be great.)
